description_long: This lamp features a cylindrical black shade mounted atop a slender, vertically oriented stem. The stem is supported by a tripod-style base with three evenly spaced legs that provide stability. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic. The lamp appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a matte black finish on the shade and base. The compact size and simple form suggest it is intended for use in small urban spaces, such as on a table or desk. There are no visible decorative embellishments, emphasizing its utilitarian style.
description: A minimalist black lamp with a cylindrical shade and a tripod metal base, designed for compact urban spaces. The design is modern and functional, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical shade and the tripod base with all three legs visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the shade and the tripod base, with two legs more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view with the cylindrical shade centered and the tripod base symmetrically displayed.
description_view_3: Side view showing the cylindrical shade and the tripod base, with one leg most visible.
